GreenhouseId.name: greenhouse_id
GreenhouseId.description: Site-unique greenhouse identity; the same slug used in MQTT topics, controller REST paths, and DB rows (RFC-007).

Window.name: window
Window.description: Trailing history window for the planning read. Resolved server-side against the greenhouse's latest stored (simulated) timestamp — `[latest − window, latest]` — not the caller's wall clock, since telemetry is timestamped on the simulated clock. The default matches the optimizer's 12-hour planning horizon (extended to 24h at day boundaries); an unknown value is rejected 422.

Interval.name: interval
Interval.description: Time-bucket width for the (min, mean, max) telemetry summaries. Defaults to 1h — the hourly summary the LLM context strategy consumes (RFC-004). An unknown value is rejected 422.
